positive: A symmetrical, intricate vector illustration pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, abstract mandalas, and delicate woodland fauna silhouettes (e.g., luminous moths, glowing ferns, spectral deer). The design must be highly detailed, utilizing a deep indigo and emerald green color palette, contrasted sharply with radiant neon aqua and electric purple accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau ornamental design and high-contrast digital print art. Composition must be centralized, ensuring clean, distinct silhouettes and strong graphical weight suitable for a repeating, single-surface apparel print. Extremely clean edges, glowing highlights, symmetrical balance. Macro detail view.
negative: blurry, amateur, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low detail, out of focus, poor composition, cartoon, photograph
